item.title: When is the next results date for Milestone Furniture Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Milestone Furniture Ltd is 16 March 2026. Time: Mar 13 2026 11:15 PM IST

item.title: What is the bonus history of Metropolis Healt?
item.description: Metropolis Healthcare Ltd recently announced a 3:1 bonus issue, with an ex-date of March 20, 2026, meaning shareholders will receive three additional shares for every one share held. Time: Mar 13 2026 11:00 PM IST

item.title: Network People Services Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 882.25
item.description: Network People Services Technologies Ltd has reached a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs 882.25, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn. The stock has underperformed its sector and continues to trade below all key moving averages, reflecting ongoing pressures within the Computers - Software & Consulting industry. Time: Mar 13 2026 08:18 PM IST
